title: Prolonged separation and filing criminal case with grave allegations amount to cruelty to husband: Madras HC
description: The Madurai Bench of the Madras High Court recently held that prolonged neglect and separation from husband coupled with filing of criminal case containing grave allegations against him would amount to mental cruelty entitling him to divorce [Muthukumar Vs Karpagavalli].A Division Bench of Justices GK Ilanthiraiyan and R Poornima made the observation while allowing a plea by a man seeking divorce. "The appellant has established that he suffered cruelty at the hands of the respondent. The respond
